/usr/bin/c++  -O3 CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/util.cpp.o -o main   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11:/root/miniconda3/envs/fed_env/lib:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu /root/miniconda3/envs/fed_env/lib/libmpicxx.so /root/miniconda3/envs/fed_env/lib/libmpi.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libstdc++.so -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lc -lgcc_s /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgcc.a
